business.name: Dallas Auto Repair
business.tagline: Trusted Auto Care in Dallas, TX
business.hours: Mon-Fri: 7:30 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat: 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM

seo.title: Dallas Auto Repair | Expert Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Dallas Auto Repair offers professional auto repair and maintenance services in Dallas, TX. From brakes to engines, trust our ASE-certified mechanics.

hero.headline: Expert Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
hero.subheadline: Reliable, honest, and affordable auto repair services to keep your vehicle running smoothly.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: From routine oil changes to complex engine diagnostics, our ASE-certified technicians handle it all. We use state-of-the-art equipment to ensure your car leaves our shop in top condition.
featureSections.cardBody: Bring your car in for any service and receive a complimentary 30-point inspection.

featureSections.title: Honest, Transparent Service
featureSections.body: We believe in clear communication and fair pricing. No hidden fees, no upsells—just quality work backed by a warranty.
bullets: Warranty on all parts and labor
featureSections.cardBody: "I've been bringing my car here for years. They always explain what's needed and the prices are fair. Highly recommend!" - Mark T.

whyChooseUs.title: ASE-Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our mechanics are certified and continuously trained to work on all makes and models.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs completed same-day. We respect your time and get you back on the road quickly.

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty on Repairs
whyChooseUs.description: All parts and labor come with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty for your peace of mind.

whyChooseUs.title: Convenient Location
whyChooseUs.description: Easily accessible in Dallas with ample parking and a comfortable waiting area.

testimonials.quote: They fixed my brakes quickly and the price was very reasonable. I'll definitely be back.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: Honest mechanics who don't try to sell you things you don't need. Great experience.
testimonials.author: James L.

testimonials.quote: My car had a strange noise and they diagnosed it in minutes. Fast, friendly, and professional.
testimonials.author: Emily R.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Serviced?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online today. We're here to help.

servicesPage.intro: At Dallas Auto Repair, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services. Whether it's a routine oil change or a major engine repair, our team has the expertise to get the job done right.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake services to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Our brake services include pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, caliper repair, and brake fluid flush. We inspect the entire braking system to identify issues early and keep you safe.
benefits: No more squeaking or grinding noises

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We replace worn components using high-quality parts.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We test your brakes to ensure optimal performance.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-70,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We'll check them during your visit.

faqs.question: Do you offer brake service warranties?
faqs.answer: Yes, all brake repairs come with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostics to pinpoint and fix engine issues.
services.longDescription: Using cutting-edge diagnostic tools, we quickly identify engine problems—from check engine lights to performance issues. Our techs repair or replace components as needed.
benefits: Accurate diagnosis saves time and money
Restored engine performance and fuel efficiency
Prevents minor issues from becoming major

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We connect to your car's computer to read error codes.

process.title: Manual Inspection
process.description: Our techs visually inspect engine components and perform tests.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: We fix the issue and test drive to confirm the repair.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem. We'll diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within an hour.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular oil changes.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are vital for engine health. We use premium oils and filters, and also check and top off all other fluids.

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We drain the old oil and remove the old filter.

process.title: Replace Filter & Oil
process.description: We install a new filter and fill with the recommended oil.

process.title: Fluid Check
process.description: We check and top off all other fluids (coolant, brake, transmission, etc.).

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000-5,000 miles for conventional oil, or up to 7,500 for synthetic.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer both conventional and synthetic options.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Stay comfortable with reliable AC and heating repair.
services.longDescription: If your car's AC or heater isn't working properly, we can diagnose and repair the system. Services include compressor repair, refrigerant recharge, and blower motor replacement.
benefits: Improved air quality inside the cabin
Prevents further damage to the system

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check for leaks, test pressures, and inspect components.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We identify the root cause of the issue.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We fix the problem and recharge the system if needed.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a leak. We'll pinpoint the issue.

faqs.question: How much does an AC repair cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary depending on the problem. We provide a free estimate before starting any work.

about.headline: About Dallas Auto Repair
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep Dallas drivers safe and satisfied.
story: Dallas Auto Repair has been serving the Dallas community for over 20 years. Founded by master mechanic John D., our shop started as a small two-bay garage and has grown into a trusted full-service repair facility. We've built our reputation on integrity, quality workmanship, and customer care.

Today, our team of ASE-certified technicians continues that tradition. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment and ongoing training to ensure we can handle any repair, from routine maintenance to complex engine overhauls. We treat every car as if it were our own.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always give honest recommendations and fair prices.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow industry best practices.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our top priority.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be a local business serving our neighbors.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: We're here to answer your questions and schedule your appointment.
